package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_error_handling_cost_error_string_built_before_error_needed: Layer: Error handling cost. Flag error message formatting before the code knows an error will be returned.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule529PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario529Positive(records []Rule529PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
